steps.title: Find the main verb slot
steps.content: The sentence needs a finite main verb for the clause 'Cordeiro ______ the library's collections.' The present-tense context is Cordeiro's current role as director.

steps.title: Use a finite verb
steps.content: A, C, and D are non-finite forms, so they cannot serve as the main verb of the independent clause. The simple present verb agrees with the singular subject and fits the current-role context. The answer is B.
